raw: This one-day Library Partner Admission Pass admits up to 4 people to a Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary. With this pass, admission is discounted to $2 per visitor over the age of 2. For a list of Wildlife Sanctuaries & Properties, please visit https://www.massaudubon.org/places-to-explore/wildlife-sanctuaries Please visit https://www.massaudubon.org/get-outdoors/wildlife-sanctuaries/trails for the latest information, including safety guidelines.

source_phrases.audience_policies[0].form: $2 per visitor over the age of 2
